parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Items per page. Maximum 100.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Count strategy. exact keeps current total-count behavior, none skips totals, hasMore lets endpoints return whether another page exists when implemented.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON-encoded recursive filter tree. Example: {"op":"AND","items":[{"field":"status","operator":"eq","value":"ACTIVE"}]}

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: JSON-encoded ordered sort rule list. Example: [{"field":"createdAt","direction":"desc"}]

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: JSON-encoded ordered list of requested columns. This is a validated presentation contract in v1.

get.description: Returns records, relationships, rules, billable sources, custom fields, attachments, and comments affected by deleting the object.

post.description: Deletes the custom object after confirmObjectKey matches and confirmDropTable is true.

info.title: Opero API
info.description: Opero API authenticated with API tokens. Obtain a token via `POST /v1/organizations/{orgId}/api-tokens` on the internal API, then pass it as `Authorization: Bearer ek_...` on every request.

api-token.description: API token in the format `ek_<hex>`. Obtain from internal API.

fieldErrors.description: Per-field validation errors. Present only on VALIDATION_FAILED responses.

unavailableMutationScopes.description: Mutation scopes rejected because the corresponding View Layout block is not available in the current runtime contract.

clientMutationId.description: Client mutation id echoed on complex mutation errors when supplied.

relationTableErrors.description: Structured relation-table validation errors keyed by table field and row id/client id.

idempotencyConflict.description: Idempotency conflict metadata. Present when a clientMutationId cannot be replayed safely.

errors.description: Structured error list. Present on responses with multiple validation errors (e.g. SQL validation).

validation.description: Structured validation payload. Present on validation conflicts that include domain-specific validation state and errors.

DictionaryEntryKeyMode.description: Controls how entry keys are assigned. CUSTOM requires callers to provide key. VALUE_KEBAB generates key from value. AUTO_INCREMENT generates the next numeric key.

key.description: Metadata key persisted on every dictionary entry.

type.description: Scalar value type accepted for this metadata key.

required.description: When true, dictionary entry create/save requires a non-null metadata value for this key.

id.description: Existing entry id. Omit for new entries created by the aggregate save.

clientRowId.description: Temporary frontend row id used to map validation errors for new rows.

key.description: Entry key for CUSTOM dictionaries. When changing to CUSTOM, existing entries may submit a replacement key or omit it to keep the current key.

metadata.description: Simple key-value metadata for this dictionary entry.

entryKeyMode.description: Controls how entry keys are assigned. CUSTOM requires callers to provide key. VALUE_KEBAB generates key from value. AUTO_INCREMENT generates the next numeric key.

entryMetadataSchema.description: Dictionary-level metadata schema applied to all entries. When present, entry metadata may only use these keys and must match their types.

entries.description: Optional initial entries. Input order becomes persisted position order.

clientMutationId.description: Client-generated retry key for aggregate create. Reuse only for an identical payload.

metadata.description: Dictionary entry metadata as simple key-value pairs.

entryMetadataSchema.description: Dictionary-level metadata schema applied to entry metadata. Empty means arbitrary scalar metadata is accepted.
Dictionary-level metadata schema applied to entry metadata. Empty means arbitrary scalar metadata is accepted.

total.description: Exact total item count. Present for count=exact and may be omitted for count=none or count=hasMore.

hasMore.description: Whether another page exists. Present for endpoints that implement count=hasMore.

mode.description: Replace-list semantics. Submitted items become the full ordered entry set.

entryKeyMode.description: Controls how entry keys are assigned. Changing to a generated mode rewrites existing entry keys when possible.

entryMetadataSchema.description: Replaces the dictionary-level entry metadata schema. Submit [] to allow arbitrary scalar metadata again.

entries.description: Missing means entries are unchanged. Present means replace the complete ordered entry set.

clientMutationId.description: Client-generated retry key for aggregate save. Reuse only for an identical payload.

isHidden.description: Hide this module from the UI
Hide this module from the UI

createDefaultForm.description: Create a default dynamic form for VIEW, EDIT, and CREATE using all fields on this object.

clearFieldValues.description: Existing field ids whose stored values may be cleared by destructive field type or storage option changes.

operations.description: Operations enabled by this object API exposure profile.

values.description: Record values allowed by the object API exposure profile.

expanded.description: Expanded relation values keyed by field key.

files.description: File metadata keyed by FILE/FILES field key.

values.description: Writable custom field values for the target object.

publicToken.description: Opaque public lookup token. Present only for public forms.

availableTypes.description: Types the current caller can use. Present on available-form responses.

accessSources.description: Union of access sources that made this form available to the current caller.

layoutAvailability.description: Layout availability by form type. Present on dynamic-object form responses.

usableTypes.description: Form types that are currently usable because the form type is available and a published valid View Layout exists.

viewLayoutId.description: The single View Layout container owned by this form. Its supported modes mirror the form types.

publicToken.description: Opaque public lookup token. Present only for public forms.

availableTypes.description: Types the current caller can use. Present on available-form responses.

accessSources.description: Union of access sources that made this form available to the current caller.

layoutAvailability.description: Layout availability by form type. Present on dynamic-object form responses.

usableTypes.description: Form types that are currently usable because the form type is available and a published valid View Layout exists.

viewLayoutId.description: The single View Layout container owned by this form. Its supported modes mirror the form types.

defaultViewFormId.description: Default VIEW form ID. Null clears the default.

defaultEditFormId.description: Default EDIT form ID. Null clears the default.

defaultCreateFormId.description: Default CREATE form ID. Null clears the default.

types.description: Form types supported by this form.

config.description: Business/runtime config such as title, successMessage, and description. Visual layout belongs to View Layouts.

types.description: Full replacement of supported form types. When absent, types are unchanged.

config.description: Full replacement of business/runtime config (title, successMessage, description). Pass null to clear. Visual layout belongs to View Layouts.

membershipId.description: Organization membership ID. This is the canonical target for user form access.

key.description: Stable organization-local identifier used by layout bindings and UI references.

code.description: JavaScript function body or script body, depending on type.

usageCount.description: Number of layout/field bindings that reference this script.

type.description: PostgreSQL data type (e.g. text, integer, boolean, timestamp with time zone, jsonb)

referencesTable.description: For REFERENCE columns: the qualified table this column points to (JOIN target)

qualifiedName.description: SQL-ready quoted identifier. Use this verbatim in FROM/JOIN clauses.

description.description: Module and object context (dynamic tables only)

tables.description: All tables accessible from this org scope — static tables plus org-owned dynamic tables.

resultSchema.description: Expected column names and types inferred from the SQL.

contractorType.description: Contractor type key from the contractor_type dictionary

vatId.description: VAT ID (NIP for Polish contractors or equivalent)

riskStatus.description: Risk status key from the risk_status dictionary

accountManagerId.description: User ID of the account manager

replace.description: Complete replacement set. Omit addresses to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all addresses.
Complete replacement set. Omit contacts to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all contacts.
Complete replacement set. Omit bankAccounts to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all bank accounts.
Complete replacement set. Omit externalIds to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all external IDs.

subscriptionType.description: Key from the subscription_type dictionary (e.g. newsletter, invoice, report)

frequency.description: Key from the subscription_frequency dictionary (e.g. daily, weekly, monthly)

replace.description: Complete replacement set. Omit subscriptions to leave unchanged; send [] to delete all subscriptions.

fileId.description: Existing uploaded file ID to attach to this contractor document link.

replace.description: Complete replacement set of document links. Omit documents to leave unchanged; send [] to detach all document links without deleting File rows.

value.description: Value — pass null to clear the field. MULTI_SELECT, FILES, USER_MULTI, CONTRACTOR_MULTI, and CUSTOM_OBJECT_MULTI expect string arrays. FILE, USER, CONTRACTOR, and CUSTOM_OBJECT expect ID strings. CUSTOM_HTML expects { html, css? }; html/css support {{ path | filter }} templates. HTML_SECTION is readonly and must not be submitted as a value.

customFields.description: Custom field values to set during contractor create. Omit to leave custom fields empty.

workflowId.description: Workflow to start immediately after creating the contractor. Required when one or more active workflows apply to contractors; omit only when no active workflow applies.

validationConfig.description: Type-specific validation config. FILE displayMode may be "any" or "image"; FILES displayMode may be "any" or "gallery".

presentation.description: Typed presentation defaults from the field definition.

renderedValue.description: Rendered CUSTOM_HTML/HTML_SECTION output. CUSTOM_HTML renders from value; HTML_SECTION renders from validationConfig.

resolvedValue.description: Resolved value for USER, USER_MULTI, CONTRACTOR, and CONTRACTOR_MULTI fields. Scalar fields return one reference object or null. Multi fields return an array preserving stored ID order, with null entries for dangling references.

file.description: Present for FILE fields when value contains a file id. Null means the stored id no longer resolves to a file.

files.description: Present for FILES fields when value contains file ids. Array order matches value; null entries mean stored ids no longer resolve to files.

contractorType.description: Contractor type key from the contractor_type dictionary

vatId.description: VAT ID (NIP for Polish contractors or equivalent)

riskStatus.description: Risk status key from the risk_status dictionary

accountManagerId.description: User ID of the account manager

values.description: Root contractor fields. Omit to leave root fields unchanged.

customFields.description: Custom field values to set during contractor save. Omit to leave custom fields unchanged.

unitsDictionaryId.description: Dictionary containing selectable units for this catalog item. Entry custom fields provide multipliers.

defaultUnitDictionaryEntryId.description: Default unit dictionary entry for this item. Must belong to unitsDictionaryId when provided.

salesBasePrice.description: Non-negative decimal. Decimal strings are accepted.

customFields.description: Custom field values saved in the same aggregate transaction as the item.

unitsDictionaryId.description: Dictionary containing selectable units for this catalog item. Entry custom fields provide multipliers.

defaultUnitDictionaryEntryId.description: Default unit dictionary entry for this item. Must belong to unitsDictionaryId when provided.

salesBasePrice.description: Non-negative decimal. Decimal strings are accepted.

customFields.description: Custom field values saved in the same aggregate transaction as the item.

uploadedBy.description: User or API token that uploaded the file.

entityType.description: API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".

createdBy.description: User or API token that created the attachment link.

entityId.description: Target entity identifier in the token organization.

entityType.description: API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".
API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".

author.description: User or API token that authored the comment.

entityId.description: Target entity identifier in the token organization.

body.example: Please verify the billing address before sending.
body.description: Comment body. Unsafe HTML is sanitized.

entityType.description: API-supported target entity type. Use "contractor" for contractors or "custom_record.<moduleKey>.<objectKey>" for records of an exposed custom object, for example "custom_record.crm.deal".

body.example: Please verify the billing address before sending.
body.description: Comment body. Unsafe HTML is sanitized.

description.description: Localised sentence explaining when this trigger fires.

category.description: Stable category key for grouping triggers in the UI. built_in = user/org/contractor, records = dynamic record events, custom_fields = custom field changes, other = manual etc.

categoryLabel.description: Localised category display label (language follows Accept-Language header).

isBuiltIn.description: True for schema-level fields, false for custom fields

config.description: Optional step config used to infer later context.

data.description: Context schema keyed by step position.

objectId.description: Custom object id required by record trigger types.

name.description: Optional display name for this step.

data.description: Input data available in the rule context as trigger.data.

logic.description: Condition group logic. Used when conditions is present. Defaults to AND at runtime.

conditions.description: Nested condition group members. When present, this condition is evaluated as a group.

value1.description: Left operand for a leaf condition. String values may contain LiquidJS variable interpolation, for example {{ workflow.stage.parameters.showAccountingSection }}.

value2.description: Right operand for a leaf condition. Not required by unary operators such as IS_EMPTY and IS_NOT_EMPTY.

condition.description: Backend-evaluated condition controlling whether the block belongs to the current runtime layout contract.

presentation.description: Typed presentation settings for this layout block.

meta.description: Runtime-only block metadata. Accepted on draft saves for editor round-trips and ignored by persistence.

validationConfig.description: Type-specific validation config. FILE displayMode may be "any" or "image"; FILES displayMode may be "any" or "gallery".

valueCount.description: Number of stored values for this definition.

dictionaryId.description: Dictionary id used as metadata for dictionary-backed SELECT/MULTI_SELECT options.

parameters.description: Saved-query parameters. String values support Liquid templates from record/user/runtime context.

options.description: Type-specific config. SELECT/MULTI_SELECT: { choices: [{ key, label? }] } or { dictionaryId }. SQL-backed SELECT/MULTI_SELECT: { source: "sql_query", queryId, parameters?, mapping: { value, label, meta? } }. REFERENCE and SUBORDINATE_OBJECT_REFERENCE read responses are normalized to { toObjectId, toModuleKey, toObjectKey, cardinality } where cardinality is "ONE_TO_ONE" or "ONE_TO_MANY". Per-form ONE_TO_MANY rendering (list/table/tiles) is configured on dynamic form FIELD element config.displayMode. FILE/FILES: { accept } (MIME type hint). FILE stores one file id; FILES stores an array of file ids. Per-form FILE displayMode (any/image) and FILES displayMode (any/gallery) are configured on dynamic form FIELD element config.displayMode. CURRENCY: { currencyKey, format?: { decimalScale?, useGrouping?, currencyDisplay? } }. CUSTOM_HTML values use { html, css? }; html/css support {{ record.* | filter }} templates. HTML_SECTION is readonly and stores { html, css? } here in options.

moduleKey.description: Dynamic module key for DYNAMIC_OBJECT_RECORD targets.

objectKey.description: Dynamic object key for DYNAMIC_OBJECT_RECORD targets.

field.description: Resolved runtime field metadata for dynamic_field and custom_field blocks. Config remains layout presentation; meta.field is the current field schema/definition, including custom-field isHidden.

dataScopes.description: Stable data scopes owned by this block. Used by backend runtime-data and mutation enforcement for composite built-in blocks.

mutationScopes.description: Stable mutation scopes owned by this block. If the block is unavailable at runtime, owning module update endpoints reject payloads for these scopes.

presentation.description: Typed presentation settings stored with the layout block.

requirements.description: Optional subset of requirements from the resolved layout. When omitted, backend resolves all current layout requirements.

clientContext.description: Optional client context for lazy loaders. Backend treats this as advisory and re-resolves the authoritative layout context.

mode.description: Controls who may use EDIT forms/views and mutation endpoints while a record is in this stage.

assignmentMode.description: Controls whether the target stage accepts exactly one assignee or multiple assignees. Defaults to single.

membershipMode.description: Controls membership candidate scope. "specific" uses membershipIds; "any" allows any membership in the organization. Defaults to "specific".

mode.description: How assignment is resolved when this transition is executed. FE should require assignee selection only for mode "select".

assignee.description: Resolved automatic assignee for fixed transition assignment or target-stage default assignment when exactly one assignee exists. Compatibility field.

assignees.description: Resolved automatic assignees for fixed transition assignment or target-stage default assignment.

candidates.description: Effective allowed choices when mode is "select", after applying the target stage assignment candidate gate. FE should send assignee for single target stages and assignees for multiple target stages.

presentation.description: Typed presentation defaults for the custom-field definition created or updated from this staged entry.

confirmDestructiveChange.description: Required for staged updates that change field type or option source and would clear existing values.

description.example: Adds the field as a compact row.
Status field from the case object.

configSchema.description: JSON Schema 2020-12 compatible object. Backend emits the supported subset used by the generic builder config panel.

set.description: One-to-one subordinate payload. Creates the owned row during parent create.

create.description: One-to-many subordinate rows to create during parent create.

clientMutationId.description: Required for aggregate create idempotency. Scope is organization + parent module/object + form + clientMutationId.

workflowId.description: Workflow to start immediately after creating the parent dynamic record. Required when one or more active workflows apply to the target dynamic object; omit only when no active workflow applies.

relationTables.description: Optional relation-table mutations. Omit or send an empty object for a parent-only create.

subordinateObjects.description: Nested subordinate object mutations keyed by SUBORDINATE_OBJECT_REFERENCE field key. Regular references must not use this envelope.

displayLabel.description: Backend-resolved display label for this record, using the dynamic object displayLabel template when configured and the standard record-label fallback otherwise.

_expanded.description: Only present when ?expand was used. Keys are expandable field keys: REFERENCE, USER, USER_MULTI, CONTRACTOR, or CONTRACTOR_MULTI. Expanded dynamic REFERENCE records include id, displayLabel, moduleKey, objectKey, objectName, color, and icon. Expanded built-in user/contractor references include id, type, displayLabel, and source-specific metadata such as email, fullName, or acronym. ONE_TO_ONE fields: value is the referenced record or null for a dangling reference. ONE_TO_MANY fields: value is an array of referenced records (null entries for dangling references). Form-gated reads may reduce ONE_TO_MANY form FIELD config.displayMode="table" values to lightweight reference summaries so custom HTML can render labels while table rows are loaded through relation-table endpoints.

_files.description: Present when the object has FILE or FILES fields with stored values. Keys are field keys. FILE values are file metadata or null for dangling references. FILES values are arrays of file metadata with null entries for dangling references.

workflow.description: Workflow state for the parent record when create started a workflow.

set.description: One-to-one subordinate payload. Creates the owned row during parent create.

create.description: One-to-many subordinate rows to create during parent create.

remove.description: One-to-one subordinate removal. Cannot be combined with set.

update.description: One-to-many subordinate rows to update. Each row must already be owned by this parent field.

removeIds.description: One-to-many subordinate row IDs to remove. Each row must already be owned by this parent field.

clientMutationId.description: Recommended for every aggregate update. Required when child rows are created or deleted.

subordinateObjects.description: Nested subordinate object mutations keyed by SUBORDINATE_OBJECT_REFERENCE field key. Regular references must not use this envelope.

items.description: Recursive filter tree. Each item is either a nested group or a condition object with `field` and `operator`.

filters.description: Recursive filter tree. V1 supports row fields only; expanded-field filters are not supported.

sort.description: Ordered sort rules. V1 supports row fields only; expanded-field sort is not supported.

search.description: Search across searchable row fields on the target object. Expanded-field search is not supported in v1.

presentation.description: Typed presentation defaults for the custom-field definition created or updated from this staged entry.

confirmDestructiveChange.description: Required for staged updates that change field type or option source and would clear existing values.

supportedModes.description: Modes supported by this layout. Resolve requests still pass one requested mode, and backend returns a layout whose supportedModes contains it.

example.description: Example value from the evaluated runtime context when available.

dynamic.description: True for generated hints such as workflow stage parameter keys discovered from the current runtime context.

removedFromLayoutOnly.description: True when a staged delete only removed the block from the published layout because another layout still references the definition.

remainingReferenceCount.description: Number of remaining layout-version references that kept the definition alive.

deletedValueCount.description: Number of custom-field value rows deleted when a staged delete removed the field definition.

removedFromLayouts.description: Other layout versions that had this custom-field block removed because the staged action was delete.
